title: BDDMP
description: A Modpack built upon Simply Optimized that makes datapack development less tedious
body:
# Bloosix's Datapack Development Modpack BDDMP is a lightweight modpack used to make certain parts of datapack development less tedious while also mainting high performance. It's also clientside, so you don't have to switch clients, or have your friends install any mods if you need them to help you test things. ## Features This modpack has many useful features for datapackers. Whether you're looking for a more seamless transition between editing datapack files and testing ingame, or small quality of life changes, you can find anything you need here. The features I find myself using the most are: - A menu for selecting and deselecting datapacks from your world - Download datapacks, resource packs, and shaders from modrinth ingame - A menu that allows you to run pre-defined commands of your choosing, and a menu to write groups of commands and run them all at once (like a datapack function) - Function profiling and benchmarking - In game item and entity NBT / Component editing - A datapack watcher (no more /reload ing) - Global resource and datapacks, which allow you to test datapacks across worlds (useful for compatabilty testing). ## Mods
A detailed list of mods, in case you need more information(1.0.0)

# Datamancer While most of the mods on this list are fairly straightforward, Datamancer offers a LOT of useful feataures that you might want to check out. A link to their wiki can be found [here](https://github.com/Trivaxy/datamancer/wiki)
